---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The Problem

> What task or workflow is difficult right now?

## Proposed Solution

> How would this feature help?

**Which app needs this?**

- [ ] Guidance (task management)
- [ ] Knowledge (notes)
- [ ] Tracking (inventory)
- [ ] All apps (cross-app feature)

## ADHD Context

**How does this help with ADHD specifically?**

- [ ] Reduces context switching
- [ ] Makes information more scannable
- [ ] Reduces cognitive load
- [ ] Improves focus
- [ ] Supports energy management
- [ ] Other: \***\*\_\_\_\*\***

## Examples

**Similar features in other tools:**
(Optional - helps us understand what you mean)

**Mockups or sketches:**
(Optional - even rough ideas help!)

## Priority

**How important is this to you?**

- [ ] Would make Altair perfect
- [ ] Significant quality-of-life improvement
- [ ] Nice to have eventually
- [ ] Just an idea

---

> 💡 **Tip:** The "why" matters more than the "how" - we might find better solutions!
> 🎯 **Note:** Altair focuses on productivity for ADHD users, not enterprise features
